habitat: Riverbanks and damp soils of Europe and Western Asia.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional bark tea for fever and aches; salicylate chemistry inspired aspirin.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditioneller Rindentee bei Fieber und Schmerzen; Salicylate inspirierten Aspirin.
activeCompounds: Salicin and related phenolic glycosides, tannins
preparation: Dried bark decoction or extracts (professional products preferred).
cautions: Same class cautions as salicylates: Reye risk in children with viral illness, stomach irritation, anticoagulant interactions. Prefer medical advice.
historicalNotes: Ancient European fever remedy; chemical ancestor of aspirin.
habitatDe: Riverbanks und damp soils von Europa und Westasien.
activeCompoundsDe: Salicin und related phenolic glycosides, tannins
preparationDe: Getrocknet Rinde Abkochung oder Extrakte (professional products preferred).
cautionsDe: Same class cautions as salicylates: Reye risk in Kinder mit viral Erkrankungen, stomach irritation, anticoagulant interactions. Prefer ärztlicher Rat.
historicalNotesDe: Ancient Europaan fever remedy; chemical ancestor von aspirin.
